titleStmt.title: SII 38.505: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 505. (A.R. No. 505 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Akhilāṇḍēśvari shrine, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Vīrarājēndrachōḷa, who was pleased take Madurai ie., Kulōttuṅga III Year ••••••

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. It seems to record that Poṉnamallaṉ alias Brahmādarāya Muttaraiyan and a lady (name not given) conferred the right of the performance of worship (Śivabrāhmaṇakāṇi) in the goddess (Nāchchiyār) temple (along with the brāhmaṇas of thirty circle) on a certain Sōdiperiyanāyan alias Villavan Bhaṭṭan. It is stated that the latter was the priest (Śivabrāhmaṇar) of the uḍaiyār temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī maturaikoṇṭaruḷiya virarājeetiraRead virarājen=tira coḻa tevaṟ
ttu poṉnamallaṉ Āṉa piramātarāyamuttaraiyanen Uṭaiyār koyil civapirāmaṇaril kā
ppiyāṉ coti periyanāyan Āṉa villavanpaṭṭanukku Ittirukkāmakkoṭṭa nācciyārkoyil civappirāmaṇakkāṇi muppatu vaṭṭa
mum tanmatānamāka nānum Ivaḷum nirvāttu kāṇiyākak kuṭuttom IvillaThere is a space of about 5 inches between villa and paṭṭaṉukpaṭṭaṉuk
�ma Innāḷ muppatuvaṭṭattāl vanta vibhavattāl vantana Eppeṟpaṭṭanavum tānātana vikki
rama
Digital edition of SII 38.505 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
